title: Replace Description Column with Tooltip Icon and Add to Side Pane
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see Salesforce descriptions via a tooltip icon in the table and as read-only text in the side pane, so that descriptions are available on demand without taking up column space.
description:
Descriptions (sourced from Salesforce) currently occupy a full table column, which wastes space when many records have no description. This ticket redesigns how descriptions are displayed.

## Changes
1. **Table**: Remove the Description column. Instead, add an inline icon with a tooltip that appears when a description exists. If no description exists, no icon is shown.
2. **Side pane**: Add the description to the detail side pane as a non-editable, read-only field.

## Note on Editability
Descriptions come from Salesforce and are currently read-only. Writeback to Salesforce is technically possible but intentionally deferred.
acceptance_criteria: Description column is removed from the table
Records with a description show an inline icon with a tooltip displaying the description
Records without a description show no icon
Description is displayed as a read-only field in the detail side pane
Description field in the side pane is not editable
ux_changes: Replaced the Description table column with an inline tooltip icon that appears only when a description exists. Added the description as a read-only field in the detail side pane.
implementation_notes: Description column removed from DataTable configuration. Inline icon rendered conditionally based on description presence. Side pane updated to include a read-only description field. Salesforce writeback for descriptions is deferred.
comment_summary: Developer removed the description from the table and added it to the side pane. Confirmed working on staging.
